label: Glarewright Stockroom
description: Glarewright Stockroom occupies a sealed rear chamber of The Glarewright Exchange, built of fused basalt and faced with matte suppressor panels that eliminate terminator flare. Salt-tight cabinets and gasketed crate racks store reflector foils, baffle vanes, and mineral-glass blanks in numbered lots aligned to the city’s surveyed approach standards. A narrow aisle grid leads to a dedicated packing slab scored for measurement and banding, with floor drains set to capture brine dust and condensate. Vent-baffled grilles and layered dust traps maintain a controlled interior against Brineshade’s mineral haze.
